data.title: Precision AQ appoints two new leaders to strengthen global operations and growth, focusing on AI, data strategy, and evidence synthesis.
data.description: In a recent press release on February 17, 2026, Precision AQ, a worldwide commercialization partner specializing in assisting life science innovators navigate commercial challenges, unveiled the selection of two new executives. These leaders are poised to drive the company's global expansion and improve the execution of its strategies. This announcement signals a significant move for Precision AQ as it aims to reinforce its presence in the global market.

data.title: P2P.org joins Northstake as node operator for stVault, providing UI and enterprise APIs for staking.
data.description: Denmark's capital, Copenhagen, witnessed an important development on February 17, 2026, as Northstake revealed that P2P.org will become a node operator on its Staking Vault Manager platform. This will provide clients with access to stVault via a user interface and high-quality APIs, enhancing Northstake's institutional-grade services. This partnership signifies a significant step in the growth of Northstake's network, bringing together the expertise of both organizations to offer enhanced staking capabilities to users.

data.title: Medius partners with Adyen to launch corporate expense cards and cashback rewards across Europe in collaboration announced on Feb. 17, 2026.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, in London, Medius, a prominent company offering AP Automation and broader Spend Management solutions, revealed a key collaboration with Adyen, a premier global financial technology platform. This partnership aims to launch corporate expense cards and enhance their range of services.

data.title: Gulf Brokers reports traders shifting to complex approach from indicators, focusing on data & context.
data.description: In Victoria, Seychelles, as of February 17, 2026, a shift has been observed in retail online trading on financial markets. Moving away from the traditional indicator-first approach focused on chart reading, traders are now placing more emphasis on data, context, and establishing a repeatable process. Rather than solely relying on identifying a flawless signal, the majority of traders are now prioritizing comprehending the reasons behind price movements. This evolution signifies a changing trend in the industry towards a more analytical and strategic trading methodology.

data.title: PacifiCorp sells assets to Portland General Electric in Washington for $1.9 billion.
data.description: In Portland, Oregon, PacifiCorp has revealed a deal with Portland General Electric Company (NYSE: POR) to offload its wind, natural gas generation, and distribution assets in Washington for $1.9 billion, subject to standard purchase price modifications. The agreement encompasses the sale of key assets like Chehalis thermal plant, Marengo wind facility, Goodnoe Hills wind facility, and the related distribution infrastructure.
The Ukrainian delegation has arrived at the venue of the negotiations in Geneva - reports

data.title: China Literature incurred a net loss of up to 850 million yuan last year due to a 1.8 billion yuan goodwill charge from New Classics Media acquisition. Stock fluctuated significantly due to this and future uncertainties.
data.description: China Literature, the online literature company, faced significant losses last year, losing up to 850 million yuan. This loss was mainly attributed to a massive charge of 1.8 billion yuan related to its acquisition of New Classics Media for 15.5 billion yuan in 2018. The company's stock performance was volatile, with a peak of HK$45.50 in October, followed by a 20% decline at the end of the year. After rebounding in early 2026, the stock tumbled due to an "incident" involving authors uprising. The stock surged by 27% after a new strategy announcement but fell again after a profit warning indicating a net loss of 750-850 million yuan. Excluding the 1.8 billion yuan impairment charge, the company would have reported a profit of 800-900 million yuan, a decrease from the previous year's 1.14 billion yuan. The filing revealed that the goodwill for New Classics Media fell below its carrying value, leading to the impairment charge. Despite challenges, the company aims to navigate through the headwinds.

data.title: Congress approved only a fraction of Trump's proposed budget cuts in recent deals, rejecting the majority.
data.description: Lawmakers have made significant decisions over the last three months by dismissing several of the president's proposals aimed at reducing the size of the government.

data.title: A start-up in the Bay Area is using tech billboards to target specific audiences, sparking curiosity.
data.description: Billboards that may seem perplexing to those not in the tech sector are now prevalent in the Bay Area. A particular company has elevated the microtargeting strategy to new heights.
